text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Well, Instructor! How'd I do?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text: ...I have to say, you did much better than I thought possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We invited the class instructor to watch a lap on turf. Bamboo was
really hoping it'd reassure her that it's safe, but the instructor has a
stiff, blank expression.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
R-right? So, um... I know this goes against what you recommended,
but still! I really think I'm in good shape to run turf at the Tracen
Meet!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...That run demonstrated your strength, loud and clear. I see how
passionate you are about turf. However...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text: I would like to hear your thoughts as well, Trainer. Are you confident that you can keep Bamboo Memory both safe and successful on turf?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but hesitate. If I switch Bamboo over too soon, it could
affect the rest of her career. I know that, but... But!
choice_data_list:
She's ready. I'm confident that Bamboo can
compete well on turf.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! YEAH! I'm ready! I'll be completely fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Bamboo's choice to make, not mine. She wants to run turf, so
I'll do everything in my power to support that.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
I see. You're a lucky one, Bamboo. It seems that you've found yourself
an excellent partner.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that resolved, we sign up Bamboo for the Tracen Meet's
1,600-meter turf race—the goal she's been working so hard towards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the Meet in pouring rain, but luckily it clears up in the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I can't say I'm surprised, but it kinda stings that Oguri didn't
recognize me.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Good morning! Here's to a good match today!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you running in the same race as me? Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When she leaves the track today, she's gonna know my name—I swear
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Remember the plan—stick right behind Oguri! Don't jump to the lead
yet, even if it seems tempting!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Just stay steady! Don't lose my cool! And don't forget what Trainer
said!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory usually leaps ahead, but she's hanging near the
back today! Is she playing things safe for her first ever turf race?
choice_data_list: (She's right where she wants to be!)
(She's right where she wants to be!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait, why did you stop me? I was off to a super great start!
choice_data_list:
That's exactly why. I don't want you going full
throttle right out of the gate.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Isn't that the best time to go all-out and shoot ahead,
though? The start's when I've got the most energy!
choice_data_list:
Well, would you do your nail care like that?
Splat the oil down and be done?

Well, would you do your nail care like that?
Splat the oil down and be done?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No way. I always do it just like my red-hot routine! Step by step, a
little each da—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh. Wait! I've gotta take races step-by-step too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo's greatest strength is the red-hot passion she pursues her
dreams with. I want her to hide it—to feint her rivals out, then blast
past them at the end.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(We've been working towards this, day by day. The steady approach
got me this far! So now—)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Now I've just gotta believe! I believe in Trainer! My dreams! And
myself!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The front pack is still closely-knit as our racers begin rounding the
fourth corner! They're almost at the final—oh?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory shoots ahead on the outside! What incredible
speed! She wasn't struggling on the turf—she was just biding her time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(C'mon, c'mon! I've gotta catch her! I'm gonna reach my rival—and
then surpass her!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: TYAAAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm standing just before the goal. There's a howling blast of wind as
Bamboo charges past me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And in that moment, I could have sworn Bamboo Memory was in front
of Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Is it Oguri? Or Bamboo?! It might be Oguri! And it is Oguri Cap, first to finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is second by just a nose! What a heart-pounding
finish! In third, there's—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... AAAAGH! I can't believe I lost!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're... Bamboo Memory, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nn? Wh-whoa! Oguri! That was some great running out there! But um,
how did you know my name?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
With the caster shouting it like that, it'd be hard not to remember...
And... that was an amazing race. I hope to run with you again.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of... OF COURSE! I promise—you haven't seen the last of me, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo is her usual bright, sporty self for the rest of the Tracen
Meet, but the second we get back to my office, she lets out a choked
breath.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...
choice_data_list: You put up an amazing fight!
You put up an amazing fight!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Sob! It's just—it's so, so frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah! We will! And you'll be with me as my trainer, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod and meet her gaze. We'll take Oguri Cap down in the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have only just started our journey together, but
knowing Bamboo, there'll be no shortage of red-hot battles ahead.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Well then, I'm lookin' forward to it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the fire in her heart, she'll burn through any obstacles in her
path.
